yaml.title: Python Labs
yaml.description: Cloud-ready computational laboratories for the multivariable calculus book.

markdown.markdown:
This page collects the Python labs for the book. Each lab is a Jupyter notebook designed for computation, visualization, simulation, and modeling. The labs can be opened directly in Google Colab, so students can run the code in a browser without installing Python first.

## How to use the labs

1. Click **Open in Google Colab** for the chapter you are studying.
2. In Colab, choose **Runtime > Run all** to execute the notebook from top to bottom.
3. To edit and save your own version, choose **File > Save a copy in Drive**.
4. For local work, download or clone the repository and open the notebook from the `labs/` folder.

The lab filenames are chapter-based and do not use course-number prefixes.

## Lab index

| Chapter | Topic | Open in Google Colab | Local notebook |
|---:|---|---|---|
| 1 | From Single Variable Calculus to Multivariable Thinking | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter01_From_Single_Variable_Calculus_to_Multivariable_Thinking.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter01_From_Single_Variable_Calculus_to_Multivariable_Thinking.ipynb) |
| 2 | Euclidean Space $\mathbb R^n$ | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter02_Euclidean_Space_mathbb_R_n.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter02_Euclidean_Space_mathbb_R_n.ipynb) |
| 3 | Vectors, Norms, Dot Products, and Projections | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter03_Vectors_Norms_Dot_Products_and_Projections.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter03_Vectors_Norms_Dot_Products_and_Projections.ipynb) |
| 4 | Lines, Planes, Hyperplanes, and Parametric Geometry | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter04_Lines_Planes_Hyperplanes_and_Parametric_Geometry.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter04_Lines_Planes_Hyperplanes_and_Parametric_Geometry.ipynb) |
| 5 | Cross Products, Curves, and Motion in Space | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter05_Cross_Products_Curves_and_Motion_in_Space.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter05_Cross_Products_Curves_and_Motion_in_Space.ipynb) |
| 6 | Functions of Several Variables | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter06_Functions_of_Several_Variables.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter06_Functions_of_Several_Variables.ipynb) |
| 7 | Limits and Continuity in Several Variables | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter07_Limits_and_Continuity_in_Several_Variables.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter07_Limits_and_Continuity_in_Several_Variables.ipynb) |
| 8 | Partial Derivatives and the Gradient | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter08_Partial_Derivatives_and_the_Gradient.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter08_Partial_Derivatives_and_the_Gradient.ipynb) |
| 9 | Linear Approximation, Tangent Planes, and Differentials | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter09_Linear_Approximation_Tangent_Planes_and_Differentials.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter09_Linear_Approximation_Tangent_Planes_and_Differentials.ipynb) |
| 10 | Chain Rule, Jacobians, and Automatic Differentiation | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter10_Chain_Rule_Jacobians_and_Automatic_Differentiation.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter10_Chain_Rule_Jacobians_and_Automatic_Differentiation.ipynb) |
| 11 | Directional Derivatives, Hessians, and Optimization | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter11_Directional_Derivatives_Hessians_and_Optimization.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter11_Directional_Derivatives_Hessians_and_Optimization.ipynb) |
| 12 | Constrained Optimization and Lagrange Multipliers | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter12_Constrained_Optimization_and_Lagrange_Multipliers.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter12_Constrained_Optimization_and_Lagrange_Multipliers.ipynb) |
| 13 | Double Integrals and Riemann Sums | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter13_Double_Integrals_and_Riemann_Sums.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter13_Double_Integrals_and_Riemann_Sums.ipynb) |
| 14 | Double Integrals over General Regions | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter14_Double_Integrals_over_General_Regions.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter14_Double_Integrals_over_General_Regions.ipynb) |
| 15 | Polar Coordinates and Change of Variables in the Plane | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter15_Polar_Coordinates_and_Change_of_Variables_in_the_Plane.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter15_Polar_Coordinates_and_Change_of_Variables_in_the_Plane.ipynb) |
| 16 | Triple Integrals and Geometry in $\mathbb R^3$ | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter16_Triple_Integrals_and_Geometry_in_R3.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter16_Triple_Integrals_and_Geometry_in_R3.ipynb) |
| 17 | Cylindrical and Spherical Coordinates | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter17_Cylindrical_and_Spherical_Coordinates.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter17_Cylindrical_and_Spherical_Coordinates.ipynb) |
| 18 | Multivariable Taylor Approximation and Quadratic Forms | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter18_Multivariable_Taylor_Approximation_and_Quadratic_Forms.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter18_Multivariable_Taylor_Approximation_and_Quadratic_Forms.ipynb) |
| 19 | Vector Fields and Gradient Fields | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter19_Vector_Fields_and_Gradient_Fields.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter19_Vector_Fields_and_Gradient_Fields.ipynb) |
| 20 | Line Integrals and Work | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter20_Line_Integrals_and_Work.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter20_Line_Integrals_and_Work.ipynb) |
| 21 | Conservative Fields, Potentials, and Green's Theorem | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter21_Conservative_Fields_Potentials_and_Greens_Theorem.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter21_Conservative_Fields_Potentials_and_Greens_Theorem.ipynb) |
| 22 | Curl, Divergence, and Surface Integrals | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter22_Curl_Divergence_and_Surface_Integrals.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter22_Curl_Divergence_and_Surface_Integrals.ipynb) |
| 23 | Stokes' Theorem and the Divergence Theorem | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter23_Stokes_Theorem_and_the_Divergence_Theorem.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter23_Stokes_Theorem_and_the_Divergence_Theorem.ipynb) |
| 24 | Multivariable Calculus for Probability and Statistics | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter24_Multivariable_Calculus_for_Probability_and_Statistics.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter24_Multivariable_Calculus_for_Probability_and_Statistics.ipynb) |
| 25 | Multivariable Calculus for Data Science and Machine Learning | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter25_Multivariable_Calculus_for_Data_Science_and_Machine_Learning.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter25_Multivariable_Calculus_for_Data_Science_and_Machine_Learning.ipynb) |
| 26 | Multivariable Calculus for Applied Mathematics | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter26_Multivariable_Calculus_for_Applied_Mathematics.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter26_Multivariable_Calculus_for_Applied_Mathematics.ipynb) |
| 27 | Review, Synthesis, and Bridge to Graduate Study | [Open in Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/wanghemath/Book-CalculusMulti/blob/main/labs/Chapter27_Review_Synthesis_and_Bridge_to_Graduate_Study.ipynb) | [Notebook](labs/Chapter27_Review_Synthesis_and_Bridge_to_Graduate_Study.ipynb) |

## Suggested workflow for instructors

The labs are intended to support a modern, computation-rich multivariable calculus course. A typical use pattern is:

- before class: students run selected visualization cells to prepare for geometric concepts;
- during class: the instructor modifies parameters live to show how formulas respond to changes;
- after class: students complete short computational exercises and submit selected plots, explanations, or numerical conclusions;
- before exams: students revisit the labs as concept maps connecting formulas, geometry, and computation.

## Suggested workflow for students

Do not treat the labs as code to copy mechanically. For each notebook, focus on three questions:

1. What mathematical object is being computed or visualized?
2. Which formula or theorem explains the computation?
3. How does the output change when the parameters, region, vector field, or model are changed?

A good lab write-up should combine code, plots, formulas, and short mathematical explanations.
